benefits.description: Retatrutide after 3 months shredding weight at accelerated rate
Retatrutide provides light feeling and tons of energy due to 3rd GCG receptor targeting fat oxidation and increased energy expenditure
Tesamorelin used to cut visceral fat and achieve lean cut
Both compounds cut desire for alcohol and fatty/sugary foods

side_effects.description: Tesamorelin causes water retention for first few days

protocol_notes: User describes Tirzepatide as overwhelming with strong appetite suppression feeling unnatural. Retatrutide feels like not on medication with better fat burning and metabolism. 3 months into Retatrutide cycle with significant results. Stacking Retatrutide and Tesamorelin. Lower doses of Retatrutide (2x/week) recommended to minimize fatigue.
